data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Failed webhook queue with manual retry'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm the existence or functionality of this feature. The only related evidence is a scenario description of a 'Failed Retry', which lacks concrete validation of the manual retry option in the dashboard, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the failed webhook queue with manual retry functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for manual retry functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the manual retry option is available in the dashboard for failed webhooks.
